package rulefixtures

// scenario for type_switch_vs_repeated_assertions: multiple sequential `if _, ok := i.(T1); ok { ... } else if _, ok := i.(T2); ok { ... }` patterns
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule689NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario689Negative(records []Rule689NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
